## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and why this change is needed.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔨 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style update (formatting, missing semicolons, etc)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Testing

Please describe how you tested your changes. Include any relevant test cases.

```bash
# Example:
pytest tests/test_api.py -v
```

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots for UI changes or new features.

## Performance Impact

Describe any performance implications of your changes.

## Deployment Notes

Any special deployment steps or backward compatibility concerns?

## Related Issues

List any related issues:
- Closes #123
- Related to #456
